nws_forecast.name: Today
nws_forecast.detailed: Mostly sunny, with a high near 47. Northwest wind 9 to 13 mph, with gusts as high as 24 mph.

nws_forecast.short_forecast: Mostly Cloudy then Slight Chance Light Snow
nws_forecast.detailed: A slight chance of snow between 4am and 5am, then a slight chance of rain and snow. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 37. Northeast wind 3 to 9 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

nws_forecast.name: Sunday
nws_forecast.detailed: Rain and snow likely. Cloudy, with a high near 49. South wind around 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

nws_forecast.detailed: Rain likely before 8pm, then rain likely and patchy fog between 8pm and 4am, then rain and snow likely. Cloudy, with a low around 33. Northwest wind 7 to 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.
